description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:6.0 Docker image, sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal, and runs a before_script to add the GitLab NuGet source via `dotnet nuget add source https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/20574571/packages/nuget/index.json -n gitlab`. Define two stages, build_server and plugins. In the build_server stage add a build_linux job that executes `cd gtaserver.core` then `dotnet publish -r ubuntu-x64 -c Release -o publish/linux-Release` and stores `gtaserver.core/publish/linux-Release` as an artifact; also add a manual build_linux_arm job that runs `cd gtaserver.core` and `dotnet publish -r linux-arm -c Release -o publish/arm-Release` with artifact `gtaserver.core/publish/arm-Release`; and a build_windows job (tagged with group-windows and windows) that runs `cd gtaserver.core` and `dotnet publish -r win10-x64 -c Release -o publish/windows-Release -p:PublishSingleFile=true` publishing `gtaserver.core/publish/windows-Release` as an artifact. In the plugins stage add a build_plugins job that runs `cd Race`, `dotnet publish -c Release -o publish`, then `cd ../DiscordBot` and `dotnet publish -c Release -o publish`, and uploads the DLL, PDB, and Maps files from both projects as artifacts. Ensure the jobs use the default image and no additional services.
